Libraries

≡ Section Menu

WIU Home > Libraries > Databases

Select A Database

Library databases index periodicals, newspapers, proceedings, e-resources & more.
Select a database most appropriate for your topic [tutorial].
Locate specific periodical titles in the Journal Titles List.

"Top" General Databases

(All Topics)

  • Academic Search Complete
  • Access World News (formerly America's Newspapers)
  • JSTOR

Browse By Subject

Alphabetical Listing -- All Library Databases
 A | B | C | D | E | F | G | H | I-K | L | M | N-O | P-Q | R | S | T | U-Z  
Full
TitleDatesCoverageFull-Text
ABI/INFORM (Business) 1971- indexes 3,700+ periodicals (2,650+ full-text) selected
Academic Search Complete (Multi-Disciplinary) dates vary indexes 5,800+ full-text journals (5,350+ peer-reviewed) selected
Access World News (formerly America's Newspapers) dates vary indexes 6,000+ (4,000 U.S.) newspapers (selected full-text) Yes
ACM Digital Library (Computing) dates vary indexes ACM journals (full-text), newsletters & proceedings Yes
ACS (Chemistry) 1996- indexes select American Chemical Society full-text journals Yes
African American Historical Serials Collection 1816-1922 indexes 170+ full-text periodicals & reports Yes
AGRICOLA (Agriculture) 1970- indexes articles, books, videos, tech. reports, software, etc. selected
AIP (Physics) dates vary indexes selected American Institute of Physics full-text journals selected
Alexander Street Press Videos View Video Collections
Alt HealthWatch (Alternative Medicine) dates vary indexes 50+ active, full-text periodicals Yes
A | B | C | D | E | F | G | H | I-K | L | M | N-O | P-Q | R | S | T | U-Z
Full
TitleDatesCoverageFull-Text
America: History & Life (North America) 1964- indexes/abstracts 1,600+ journals (1,400+ peer-reviewed) selected
American State Papers, 1789-1838 1789-1838 indexes legislative and executive documents Yes
Anthropological Literature 19th century - indexes journals, reports, commentaries & other sources No
APS (Physics) dates vary indexes select American Physical Society full-text journals selected
ArchiveGrid dates vary indexes/describes worldwide library and museum archival collections Yes
Art Abstracts 1984- indexes/abstracts 350+ active journals (250+ peer-reviewed) selected
Arte Público Hispanic Historical Collection: Series 1 Colonial Period to 1960 indexes full-text series of U.S. Hispanic history, literature & culture No
ArticleFirst (Multi-Disciplinary) 1990- indexes 16,000+ periodicals selected
ASABE Technical Library (Agriculture & Bio-Engineering) 1998- indexes ASABE technical reports, proceedings, books, journals (selected full-text) selected
ATLA Religion Database 1949- indexes 2,500 journals (1,200 active); 3.4M citations selected
A | B | C | D | E | F | G | H | I-K | L | M | N-O | P-Q | R | S | T | U-Z
Full
TitleDatesCoverageFull-Text
Bibliography of the History of Art 1975-2007 indexes 1,200+ periodicals; includes RILA citations N/A
Biography & Genealogy Master Index Antiquity to Present indexes biographies covering individuals of all times and in all fields No
Biography Reference Source dates vary indexes full-text biographies (390,000+ bios from major reference sources: Biography, Biography Today, Cambridge Dictionary of American Biography, et al) Yes
Biological Abstracts 1996- indexes 4,000+ journals No
Black Thought and Culture dates vary indexes primary source documents, articles, letters, speeches, & interviews Yes
Business Source Premier dates vary indexes 1,000+ full-text periodicals (650+ peer-reviewed) selected
Catalog of U.S. Gov. Publications (via GPO) 1976- indexes 500,000+ government publications in all formats selected
Catalog of U.S. Gov. Publications (via FirstSearch) 1976- indexes 500,000+ government publications in all formats selected
CCH Accounting Research Manager current indexes accounting statements, standards, interpretation & analysis Yes
CCH Tax (AnswerConnect) 1913- provides federal and state tax codes, cases, citations, analyses, interpretation and rulings Yes
A | B | C | D | E | F | G | H | I-K | L | M | N-O | P-Q | R | S | T | U-Z
Full
TitleDatesCoverageFull-Text
Chicago Tribune (Historical) (via ProQuest Historical Newspapers) 1849-1999 indexes full page images back to the 1st issue Yes
Chicago Tribune (Recent) (via ProQuest Digitized Newspapers) 2008-Recent (3-mo. embargo) indexes full page images Yes
Child Development & Adolescent Studies dates vary indexes/abstracts 230 journals (220+ peer-reviewed) No
CINAHL w/ Full Text (Nursing, Allied Health) 1983- indexes 330+ full-text periodicals (260+ peer-reviewed) Yes
Civil Rights & Social Justice (via HeinOnline) dates vary indexes primary sources & other publications from the Commission on Civil Rights, legislative histories on landmark legislation, selected briefs from U.S. Supreme Court cases, & more Yes
ClasePeriodica Clase: 1975- ; Periodica: 1978- indexes Latin American journals in the humanities & social sciences selected
Communication & Mass Media Complete dates vary indexes 275 full-text periodicals (260+ peer-reviewed) selected
Congressional Research Service Reports (via Univ. N. Texas) dates vary indexes a publicly-released collection of CRS reports Yes
Consumer Health Complete current indexes 480+ full-text consumer-oriented periodicals; 470+ e-reference books; videos selected
CQ Electronic Library dates vary indexes full-text articles and Congressional info from CQ Press Yes
A | B | C | D | E | F | G | H | I-K | L | M | N-O | P-Q | R | S | T | U-Z
Full
TitleDatesCoverageFull-Text
CQ Researcher 1923- indexes single-themed, 12,000-word reports (background, stats, assessment, biblio.) Yes
Criminal Justice (via ProQuest) 1981- indexes 100+ full-text periodicals; abstracts 250+ other periodicals Yes
Criminal Justice Abstracts (via EBSCO) 1968- indexes/abstracts 475+ journals (425+ peer-reviewed) No
data.census.gov (formerly American FactFinder) 1790- indexes demographic, economic and social data about the U.S., Puerto Rico & territories Yes
Dictionary of Literary Biography (via Gale) Antiquity to Present indexes scholarly, full-text articles on authors & their works Yes
Digital Sanborn Maps 1867-1970 indexes/displays maps of Illinois towns & cities Yes
Dissertations & Theses @ WIU (via ProQuest) 2008- [plus select titles 1975-2002] indexes/abstracts full-text theses & dissertations produced at WIU Yes
Dissertations & Theses Global (via ProQuest) 1861- (indexes); 1980- (abstracts); 1988- (theses abstracts) indexes 2.0+ million dissertations & theses of accredited institutions; 600,000+ in full-text selected

E-Journal Collections View e-Journal Collections (by vendor)

TitleDatesCoverageFull-Text
EBSCO (Multi-Disciplinary) dates vary lists & enables cross-searching of vendor's bibliographic databases selected
ECO (Multi-Disciplinary) 1995- (varies by journal) indexes 900+ periodicals selected
EconLit (Economics) 1886- indexes U.S/Intl. economic periodicals, books & other sources selected
EndNote (citation manager) n/a bibliographic management tool No
ERIC (Education) 1966- indexes 1.3+ million articles, documents & reports selected
Ethnic Diversity Source dates vary indexes 435+ active, full-text periodicals (350 peer-reviewed); e-books, primary sources, biographies Yes
Family & Society Studies Worldwide dates vary indexes/abstracts 439 journals (430+ peer-reviewed) No
Family Studies Abstracts dates vary indexes/abstracts 175+ peer-reviewed journals No
FirstSearch (Multi-Disciplinary) varies by database lists & enables cross-searching of vendor's bibliographic databases selected
Funk & Wagnalls New World Encyclopedia updated annually indexes 25,000+ full-text entries (w/ images) Yes
A | B | C | D | E | F | G | H | I-K | L | M | N-O | P-Q | R | S | T | U-Z
Full
TitleDatesCoverageFull-Text
Gale Literature Criticism c.1950- indexes literary biographies, scholarly commentary, criticism, & analysis (Contemporary Literary Criticism, v1:1973-) Yes
GeoRef (Geology) 1669- (N. America); 1933- (International) indexes 2.0+ million articles, books, maps, reports, & theses selected
GeoScienceWorld varies (full-text generally 2000 to present) indexes 50+ peer-reviewed, full-text journals; 2,300+ ebooks Yes
Gerritsen Collection (Women's History) 1543-1945 indexes 4,700 books, pamphlets and periodicals about women (full-text: digitized images) Yes
GovInfo (formerly FDSys/GPO Access) dates vary (primarily 1995-) indexes official federal government information from legislative, executive & judicial branches selected
GreenFILE (Environmental Research) dates vary indexes 15,000+ open access, full-text records; 1.3M records selected
Gun Regulation & Legislation in America dates vary indexes scholarly periodicals, legislative histories, Supreme Court rulings, CRS reports (full-text) Yes
Handbook of Latin American Studies 1936- indexes/abstracts books, articles, chapters & papers No
HarpWeek 1857-1912 indexes 19th & early 20th century American primary resources (original page images) Yes
Health Source: Consumer Edition 1985- indexes 70 full-text consumer health magazines Yes

Full
TitleDatesCoverageFull-Text
Health Source: Nursing/Academic 1975- indexes/abstracts 930+ periodicals; 170+ active/full-text (135+ peer-reviewed) Yes
Historical Abstracts (World History) 1954- indexes/abstracts 2,200+ active journals (2,000+ peer-reviewed) selected
Historical Statistics of the United States pre-Colonial Period - Present indexes statistical tables; more than 37,000 data series Yes
History Reference Source (undergraduate; e-books) dates vary indexes 2,000 reference e-books, 140+ full-text periodicals; 56,000 full-text primary sources, 42,000 full-text biographies Yes
Homeland Security Digital Library dates vary indexes 59,000 U.S. policy documents, presidential directives, & national strategy documents selected
Hospitality & Tourism Index 1960- indexes/abstracts 250+ active journals (150+ peer-reviewed) selected
Humanities Source Ultimate dates vary indexes/abstracts 2,600+ periodicals (2,270+ peer-reviewed; 1,780+ full-text) selected
IBISWorld (Industry/Company Data) current indexes regularly updated U.S. industry reports & company benchmarking Yes
Illinois State Library DB Collection (specialized EBSCO databases grant) dates vary indexes bibliographic databases granted to Illinois libraries by ISL selected
Ingenta (Multi-Disciplinary) 1990- indexes/abstracts 10,000+ academic/professional publications No

Full
TitleDatesCoverageFull-Text
Interactive Media Bias Chart (via Ad Fontes Media) current indexes web, podcast & TV sources rated for bias/reliability Yes
Intl. Bibliography of Theatre & Dance 1958- indexes 115+ active, full-text periodicals Yes
Intl. Financial Statistics (IMF) 1945- (latest available) indexes IMF data for 200+ countries Yes
Intl. Political Science Abstracts 1951- indexes/abstracts 900 journals; book reviews & edited works selected
IOP (Physics) varies by title indexes 70+ select Institute of Physics full-text journals selected
IPA Source (Music) dates vary indexes transcriptions & literal translations of opera arias and art song texts (11,000+ titles) Yes
JAMA (Health/Medicine) dates vary indexes Journal of the American Medical Association (full-text) Yes
Journal Titles (WIU's print/full-text titles) varies by title indexes all periodical titles (e-full-text/print/microform) available online or on the shelves of WIU Libraries selected
JSTOR (Multi-Disciplinary Journal Archive) varies by title indexes a backfile of major academic journals (selected full-text) Yes
Learning Express: Education, Job & Career Accelerator current indexes educational, job preparation and career development materials; GED/ACT/GRE/LSAT/TOEFL/etc. test preparation; skill development. [Note: Users must create/register a free account] Yes

Full
TitleDatesCoverageFull-Text
Legal Source dates vary indexes 950+ active, full-text periodicals (850+ peer-reviewed; 370+ law reviews) Yes
LGBTQ+ Source dates vary indexes 120+ active, full-text periodicals; books, videos, primary sources Yes
Library & Information Science Source indexes 320+ active, full-text periodicals (255+ peer-reviewed) Yes
Library Literature & Information Science Full Text dates vary indexes 90+ active, full-text periodicals (60 peer-reviewed) Yes
Library, Information Science & Technology Abstracts 1966- indexes/abstracts 520+ journals (420+ peer reviewed); books & research reports No
Literary Reference Source indexes synopses, critical essays, book reviews, literary journals, biographies; includes full-text classic novels, short stories & poems Yes
MAS Complete (secondary level) dates vary indexes 540+ full-text, high-school-level magazines; 590+ reference ebooks; 75,000+ Assoc. Press videos Yes
MasterFILE Complete (multi-disciplinary, general sources) dates vary indexes 2,300+ full-text magazines; 1,000+ reference e-books & general sources Yes
MathSciNet 1940- indexes mathematical publications (formerly Mathematical Reviews) No
MEDLINE (Health/Medicine -- via Web of Science) 1950- [strength: indexing] 3,500 periodicals selected

TitleDatesCoverageFull-Text
MEDLINE Ultimate (Health/Medicine --via EBSCO) 1966- [strength: full-text availability] 2,440+ active full-text journals (2,420+ peer-reviewed) Yes
Mergent Archives 1909- indexes full-text company histories, business descriptions, financial statements Yes
Military & Government Collection dates vary indexes/abstracts 480+ periodicals (280+ full-text) selected
MLA (Language/Literature) 1926- indexes 25,000+ journals, book series, & proceedings selected
MLA Directory of Periodicals (via pub. info only) current provides information about MLA-indexed periodicals Yes
Monthly Bulletin of Statistics Online current indexes monthly tables; quarterly/annual tables illustrating trends Yes
Music Periodicals Database (formerly IIMP) 1874- indexes/abstracts 430+ international periodicals (110 full-text) selected
National Historical Geographic Information System 1790- indexes population, housing, agricultural, & economic data; GIS-compatible boundary files for US units Yes
Naxos Music Library dates vary indexes streaming music (190,000+ CDs) No
NCJRS (Criminal Justice) 1970- indexes/abstracts U.S./Intl. criminal justice journals & other materials No

TitleDatesCoverageFull-Text
New York Times (Recent) (via ProQuest Digitized Newspapers) 2008-Recent (30-day embargo) indexes full page images from The New York Times Yes
Newspaper Source Plus current, dates vary indexes 1,100+ full-text newspapers (500 U.S./600+ Intl.); 1.6M TV/radio news transcripts Yes
Nexis Uni (formerly LexisNexis Academic) dates vary indexes major U.S./Intl. newspapers (selected full-text), legal periodicals, & business sources Yes
NoveList Plus (readers' advisory) current indexes reviews & recommendations of popular fiction/non-fiction books Yes
O*NET (Occupations) current indexes/describes 1,100+ occupations Yes
OAIster (union catalog of digital resources) dates vary indexes 19+ million digital objects from 1,000+ organizations selected
Open Access Content (via FirstSearch) dates vary indexes Open Access books, journals, articles, reports from 1,000+ publishers Yes
OregonPDF in Health & Performance 1950- indexes/abstracts theses & dissertations; selected full-text on local microfiche selected
Oxford English Dictionary 1150- indexes the complete 20+ volume (2nd. ed.) historical dictionary of English (full-text) Yes
Oxford Music Online dates vary indexes multiple reference sources w/ articles, images & audio (includes Grove Music Online, Oxford Companion to Music & Oxford Dictionary of Music selected

Philosopher's Index 1940- indexes 1,850 journals & 13,000+ dissertations selected
Primary Search (Children's Magazines) dates vary indexes 100+ full-text children's magazines & elementary reference ebooks Yes
ProceedingsFirst (Citations; The British Library) 1993- indexes worldwide conference proceedings No
Professional Development Collection (Education) dates vary indexes/abstracts 750+ journals; 450+ full-text journals (280+ peer-reviewed) selected
Project Muse primarily 1995- indexes 175+ multi-disciplinary full-text journals Yes
ProQuest (multiple dbs) dates vary lists & enables cross-searching of vendor's bibliographic databases selected
ProQuest Digitized Newspapers (Chicago Tribune, NY Times) 2008-Recent (3-mo. embargo) indexes full page images from Chicago Tribune and New York Times Yes
PsycARTICLES dates vary indexes 115+ full-text, peer-reviewed journals Yes
Psychology & Behavioral Sciences Collection dates vary indexes 325+ active, full-text periodicals (320 peer-reviewed) Yes

PubMed (Health/Medicine; includes MEDLINE) 1949- [strength: indexing] citations/abstracts; selected full-text via PubMed Central & other sources selected
Readers' Guide Abstracts 1890- (includes R.G. Retrospective 1890-1982) indexes 550+ leading magazine periodicals No
Regional Business News dates vary indexes 315+ full-text newspapers and newswires (U.S./Canada: metro/rural); includes 775,000+ TV/radio news transcripts Yes
Religion & Philosophy Collection dates vary indexes 130+ active, full-text periodicals (100+ peer-reviewed) Yes
RIA Checkpoint (Tax Law) current indexes tax guides, handbooks, alerts, codes, cases, legislation Yes
Saskia Digital Archive (Art History) Antiquity - Present indexes 30,000+ digital images of paintings, sculpture, architecture selected
Science Citation Index Expanded (via Web of Science) 2002- indexes 6,650+ journals across 150 scientific disciplines selected
SciFinder: Chemical Abstracts 1907- (citations) indexes full-text articles, patents, & more from Chemical Abstracts selected
